Notes: 2017 NCAA Division III Women's Basketball National Championship Game. Amherst
wins D3 WBB National Title. All-Tourney Team:Byrd-CNU, Langer-St.Thomas,
M. Doswell-Amherst, North-Tufts, A. Doswell-Amherst (Most Outstanding Player>
Lowest scoring D3 WBB Title game in D3 History.
Game.Officials: Ashley Moyer-Gliech,  Karen Pammer,  Stafford Farmer-Lee
